description: Supply / Distribution Agreement - governs the purchase, delivery, and quality of goods between supplier and buyer

supply_metadata.description: Basic agreement identification and party information

agreement_title.description: Official title of the supply or distribution agreement

expiration_date.description: Date the agreement expires or ends

supplier_name.description: Full legal name of the supplier or manufacturer

buyer_name.description: Full legal name of the buyer or distributor

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement

jurisdiction.description: Courts or venue for disputes arising under the agreement

territory.description: Geographic territory covered by the supply or distribution arrangement

exclusivity.description: Whether the supply or distribution arrangement is exclusive

products.description: Products covered, specifications, and product lifecycle provisions

products_covered.description: List of products subject to the agreement

sku.description: Stock keeping unit or part number

specifications_reference.description: Reference to detailed product specifications document or exhibit

minimum_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity per order for this product

lead_time_days.description: Standard lead time in days from order to delivery

product_modifications_process.description: Process for modifying product specifications or design

new_product_inclusion_process.description: Process for adding new products to the agreement

product_discontinuation_notice_days.description: Days of advance notice required before discontinuing a product

pricing.description: Pricing structure, adjustments, discounts, and rebates

price_list_reference.description: Reference to the applicable price list, exhibit, or schedule

pricing_model.description: Method used to determine product pricing

currency.description: Currency in which prices are quoted and payments are made

price_adjustment_frequency.description: How often prices may be adjusted or reviewed

price_adjustment_mechanism.description: Mechanism or formula for adjusting prices over time

price_protection_period_months.description: Period in months during which prices are fixed and cannot be changed

most_favored_customer_clause.description: Clause ensuring the buyer receives the most favorable pricing available

volume_discounts.description: Discount tiers based on purchase volume

discount_percent.description: Discount percentage applicable to the tier

rebate_structure.description: Structure and terms of any volume rebates or retrospective discounts

ordering_and_delivery.description: Order process, forecasting, delivery terms, and logistics

forecast_requirements.description: Requirements for providing demand forecasts to the supplier

frequency.description: How often forecasts must be provided

binding_period.description: Period for which forecasts become binding commitments

minimum_annual_purchase_commitment.description: Minimum annual purchase volume or value the buyer commits to

maximum_order_quantity.description: Maximum quantity that can be ordered in a single order or period

delivery_schedule.description: Agreed delivery schedule or lead time commitments

packaging_requirements.description: Requirements for how products must be packaged

labeling_requirements.description: Requirements for product labeling and marking

transportation_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for arranging and paying for transportation

risk_of_loss_transfer_point.description: Point at which risk of loss or damage transfers from supplier to buyer

quality_and_compliance.description: Quality standards, inspection, testing, and regulatory compliance

quality_standards.description: Quality management standards the supplier must maintain

inspection_rights.description: Buyer's right to inspect products or supplier facilities

testing_requirements.description: Testing that must be performed on products before or after delivery

acceptance_period_days.description: Number of days the buyer has to accept or reject delivered products

defect_rate_threshold.description: Maximum acceptable defect rate for delivered products

corrective_action_process.description: Process for supplier corrective actions when quality issues arise

recall_obligations.description: Obligations and responsibilities in the event of a product recall

traceability_requirements.description: Requirements for product traceability through the supply chain

regulatory_compliance.description: Regulatory frameworks and standards the products must comply with

certificates_of_analysis_required.description: Whether certificates of analysis or conformance must accompany shipments

inventory_and_planning.description: Inventory management, safety stock, and demand planning provisions

safety_stock_requirements.description: Requirements for maintaining safety stock levels

consignment_arrangement.description: Whether products are held on consignment and the applicable terms

vendor_managed_inventory.description: Whether the supplier manages inventory levels at the buyer's location

buffer_stock_days.description: Number of days of buffer stock the supplier must maintain

demand_planning_process.description: Collaborative demand planning process between supplier and buyer

capacity_reservation.description: Whether the supplier reserves manufacturing capacity for the buyer

raw_material_sourcing_restrictions.description: Restrictions or requirements on sourcing of raw materials

warranties.description: Product warranties, remedies, and warranty claim process

product_warranty_months.description: Duration of the product warranty in months

warranty_scope.description: Scope of what the warranty covers

warranty_exclusions.description: Exclusions or limitations to the warranty coverage

defect_remedy.description: Primary remedy available for defective products

warranty_claim_process.description: Process for submitting and handling warranty claims

shelf_life_guarantee.description: Minimum remaining shelf life guaranteed at time of delivery

fitness_for_purpose_warranty.description: Warranty that products are fit for the buyer's intended purpose

liability_and_insurance.description: Product liability, indemnification, insurance, and force majeure

product_liability.description: Allocation of product liability between supplier and buyer

indemnification_for_defects.description: Supplier's obligation to indemnify the buyer for claims arising from defective products

indemnification_for_ip_infringement.description: Supplier's obligation to indemnify the buyer for intellectual property infringement claims

recall_cost_responsibility.description: Which party bears the costs of a product recall
extraction_hints: bear all costs associated with recall

limitation_of_liability.description: Caps or limitations on liability between the parties

insurance_requirements.description: Insurance coverage each party must maintain

product_liability_amount.description: Minimum product liability insurance coverage amount

general_liability_amount.description: Minimum commercial general liability insurance coverage amount

force_majeure.description: Force majeure provisions including qualifying events and obligations during force majeure

term_and_termination.description: Agreement duration, renewal, termination rights, and transition

initial_term_months.description: Duration of the initial agreement term in months

auto_renewal.description: Whether the agreement automatically renews at the end of the term

termination_for_convenience_notice_days.description: Days of notice required to terminate without cause

termination_for_cause_grounds.description: Grounds that constitute cause for termination

minimum_purchase_shortfall_as_cause.description: Whether failure to meet minimum purchase commitments constitutes cause for termination

effects_of_termination.description: Consequences and obligations that apply upon termination

last_time_buy_rights.description: Buyer's right to place a final order before termination takes effect

transition_period_days.description: Number of days for transition to an alternative supplier after termination

inventory_buyback_obligation.description: Whether the supplier must buy back unsold inventory upon termination
